name: EXILE | Banished from the Hero's Party.
description:
(LEGACY EDITION)
"Banished from the Hero's Party for a crime that you never commit, now what?"

===============================

Etermyst

Welcome to Etermyst, adventurer, a land of ancient magic and profound danger where your legend awaits. From the feudal kingdoms of the north to the sun-drenched maritime republics of the south, this continent is a tapestry of diverse cultures and constant strife. A fragile peace is shattered by multidimensional demonic invasions, a consuming flesh-like bio-horror, and a necromantic empire, threats so vast that no single nation can face them alone.

Here, you can be anyone. Meet the graceful Elves of Elvaria, the adaptable Humans found in every corner, the stout and communal Dwarves, the fierce bestial Demi-humans, or the honour-bound Oni. Redeem yourself in the eye of the traditional Triple Alliance, or join the scholarly and mercantile nations of the Golden Sphere, or aide the troubled Kaiserreich. Discover isolated realms like the socialist Dwarven Commune, the honourbound Oni or the isolationist Fanged Confederacy, each holding fast to their unique ways.

Your call to action can come from anywhere, the Waywarden guild, offer from the Golden Sphere, unlikely companionship in the wild, survive in a ragtag group of survivors or carve your own paths in Etermyst.

===============================

We used to be comrades...

>>The Hero's Party<<

THE premier Hero Party of Etermyst. The best of the best that the Triple Alliance has to offer and is sponsored by the Waywarden Guild. They stand between annihilation and the civilized world. Led by the legendary hero, Taggard.

===============================

You received an offer...

>>The Aquilon<<

The Golden Sphere's answer to the Hero's Party, established to reduce their dependency on Taggard's party, each of the party member are competent and is comparable to the Hero's Party, but beware of the egotistical leader.

===============================

The white lilies bloom but they are wary of you...
creator: Popslide422
